channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Legal AI startup Harvey raises $200 million at $11 billion valuation
item.description: Legal software company Harvey has secured $200 million in funding, valuing the firm at $11 billion. This investment will fuel the expansion of its artificial intelligence agent. Harvey develops AI tools for law firms and corporate legal departments, automatin… [Intel]

item.title: Epic Microsystems raises $21M to revolutionize power for next-gen AI datacenters
item.description: Epic Microsystems, a semiconductor company developing power delivery systems for artificial intelligence infrastructure, today announced it has raised $21 million in early-stage funding to accelerate the commercialization of its vertical power delivery techno… [Intel]

item.title: Arm flexes its chip-making muscles (with Meta’s help)
item.description: Chip designer Arm has expanded its horizons and become a chip maker for the first timeIts first product is a CPU designed for agentic AI infrastructureThe chip… [Meta]

item.title: Kentucky farm family rejects $26 million offer for 600 acres of land from unnamed AI data center suitor — declines 7x offer, wants to ‘Stay and hold and feed a nation’
item.description: A family in Northern Kentucky received a $26 million offer for half their land — a price that's worth more than 7 times the going rate for the area. But despite the massive price, they still refused, saying that they "fed a nation off of it."

item.title: Alibaba Just Made a $100 Billion Bet on AI. Here's What It Means for Investors. - The Motley Fool
item.description: Alibaba Just Made a $100 Billion Bet on AI. Here's What It Means for Investors. The Motley Fool [Alibaba]

item.title: Arm jumps 13% in premarket after saying first in-house chip set to generate $15 billion in revenue
item.description: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025.

item.title: Hugo Barra's return to Meta 5 years after exit underscores Zuckerberg's AI urgency
item.description: During Hugo Barra's first stint at Meta, the company was pushing heavily into VR. Now, he's back and the focus is AI agents. [Meta, ServiceNow]

item.title: Trump Redirects Energy Firm Investment Away from Biden-Era Wind Energy Schemes to Oil & Gas Development
item.description: It's the "Real Green Deal", as a new investigation reveals that a half-million balsa trees are illegally logged in Amazon for wind turbine production. The post Trump Redirects Energy Firm Investment Away from Biden-Era Wind Energy Schemes to Oil & Gas Develop… [Amazon]

item.title: Intel Stock Edges Higher Amid Foundry Progress and AI PC Momentum as Chipmaker Navigates Competitive Landscape
item.description: Intel Corp. shares closed modestly higher Tuesday, trading around $44.06 after a session that saw the stock fluctuate between $43.20 and $44.31, as investors weighed ongoing foundry advancements, strong demand for AI-related products and persistent challenges… [Intel]

item.title: Adani eyes partnerships with Meta, Google amid data centre boom
item.description: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani is in talks with American technology giants including Meta Platforms Inc. and Google for partnerships in his fast-expanding data centre business, according to people familiar with the matter. [Meta, Alphabet]
